scope: HSK exam vocabulary release workbooks, separate from the normal LunaCards deck export contract.

source_policy.source_role: Chinese base vocabulary membership, POS, classifiers and source dictionary meanings. Card-facing traditional forms, pinyin and EN meanings are curated separately to avoid raw dictionary artifacts.

main_sheet.language_columns_source: config/language-order.json spreadsheetCode values in order, excluding ZH for HSK because Chinese is already represented by fixed source fields
main_sheet.example_language_columns_source: config/language-order.json spreadsheetCode values in order excluding ZH, prefixed as example_<SPREADSHEET_CODE>

course_metadata_sheet.language_columns_source: config/language-order.json spreadsheetCode values in order, excluding ZH
course_metadata_sheet.module_value: localized short label for Chinese, for example EN Chinese, RU Китайский, KK Қытай тілі
course_metadata_sheet.notes: Course Metadata follows the ordinary LunaCards workbook shape: header row plus Title, Description, Module and Category rows. Module/Category are short mobile-app labels and do not require sentence punctuation. Category keeps the stable exam-level label HSK <level> because HSK is a proper course/exam name.

field_rules.example_pinyin: required for every row together with example_zh
field_rules.translation_cells: short learner-facing meaning in the learner language; no grammar explanations or long dictionary articles
field_rules.word_display_article_policy: for HSK word columns, include noun articles only where they are normal learner-facing dictionary display for that language (for example ES/FR/DE/IT/PT/NL/SV/NO/DA/RO); do not invent artificial articles for no-article languages; English a/an is optional in HSK glosses and required only if converted into the ordinary LunaCards deck display model
field_rules.example_translation_cells: short translation of example_zh in the learner language; no target-language transcription
field_rules.zh_language_column: not included in HSK language columns; use simplified/traditional/pinyin/example_zh/example_pinyin fixed source fields instead
